tagline: Daily I Ching oracle practice, credentialed on-chain.
description_md:
Each morning, practitioners cast the I Ching using the TrueSight Oracle. Every session is signed with the practitioner's RSA keypair and submitted as a [PRACTICE EVENT] to the TrueSight DAO lineage-credentials ledger.

There is no attestation chain — this is a solo practice log. The credential is the cumulative record of your daily grounding sessions, verifiable from any QR code on a printed certificate.

How it works

  1. Visit oracle.truesight.me and cast your reading.
  2. The session auto-records to your credential.
  3. View your practice log here — each session shows the hexagrams drawn and the advisory received.
